prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约9764名，2024年约7919名，2025年大幅后移至18209名，近3年波动剧烈；2025年基准约18209名；本省理科计划2023年101人 、2024年101人、2025年123人；2026年计划118人，较2025年缩招约4%，竞争略有缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第134名，近年排名在130-160区 间波动，整体稳定；2022年声誉中性/混合（投档线逐年下降趋势），2023年偏正面（食堂服务好）；抖音热度总排名第86位（一般），短视频曝光量一般；202 2年投档异常中关注（投档线自2018年逐年下降），但近年未见明显断档；畜牧学A、作物学A-，为该校传统农林优势学科，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 四川农 业大学位于四川省成都市，与新疆距离较远，跨省报考需考虑地域偏好因素；该校在新疆招生计划占比较小，属外省招生；计算机类、电气工程、电子信息等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，该校相关专业（计算机、电气、电子等）报考竞争较激烈；本省2026年普通高考总人数约2380 00人（不确定标记），按2025年理科占比68.6%估算约163268人，较2025年理科52538人大幅增加，竞争显著加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅后移的波动趋势 、2026年计划小幅缩招（4%）、本省考生规模大幅增加（竞争加剧）以及学校声誉平稳偏正面等因素，在2025年基准18209名基础上预计竞争略加剧；预测最低位次约17815名，区 间17315-18315名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The lowest ranking in 2023 was approximately 9764, in 2024 approximately 7919, and in 2025 it significantly shifted backward to 18209, with drastic fluctuations over the past 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 18209; the provincial science enrollment plan was 101 in 2023, 101 in 2024, and 123 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 118, a reduction of about 4% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is approximately 134th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 130-160, overall stable; in 2022, reputation was neutral/mixed (admission scores showed a declining trend year by year), in 2023, slightly positive (good cafeteria service); Douyin popularity total ranking 86th (average), short video exposure average; in 2022, admission anomaly was of moderate concern (admission scores declining year by year since 2018), but no significant gaps in recent years; Animal Science A, Crop Science A-, are the university's traditional agricultural and forestry advantageous disciplines, attracting some applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Sichuan Agricultural University is located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province, far from Xinjiang, so cross-provincial applications need to consider regional preferences; the university's enrollment plan in Xinjiang is relatively small, belonging to out-of-province enrollment; social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, and Electronic Information remains high, and competition for related majors (Computer, Electrical, Electronics, etc.) at this university is relatively intense; the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in the province in 2026 is approximately 238,000 (uncertain mark), estimated at about 163,268 based on the 2025 science proportion of 68.6%, a significant increase from the 2025 science figure of 52,538, sharply intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant backward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the slight reduction in 2026 enrollment plan (4%), the substantial increase in the number of provincial candidates (intensified competition), and the stable and slightly positive school reputation, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 18209; the predicted lowest ranking is approximately 17815, with a range of 17315-18315.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 17315-18315, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 17300), you can focus on popular engineering majors like Computer Science and Technology and Electrical Engineering and Automation; if your ranking is in the middle of the range (around 17800), it is recommended to prioritize advantageous or practical majors such as Agronomy, Accounting, and Veterinary Medicine; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 18300), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors as a safety net for admission.
